song.title: Relentless
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B P C
song.lyrics:
[V1] Salvation sounds a new beginning As distant hearts being believing Redemption’s bid is unrelenting Your love goes on, Your love goes on [v2] The time is up for a chasing shadow You gave the world a light to follow A hope that shines beyond tomorrow Your love goes on, Your love goes on [P] You carry us, carry us, when the world gives way You cover us, cover us, with Your endless grace
[C] Your love is relentless, Your love is relentless Your love is relentless, Your love is relentless
[B] Tearing through the veil of darkness Breaking every chain, You set us free Fighting for the furthest heart You gave Your life for all to see
